steps.name: precondition_backend_frontend
steps.reason: Local API and frontend are reachable.

steps.name: provision_synthetic_study_version
steps.reason: Created active three-round Modified Delphi synthetic study/version.

steps.name: create_synthetic_participants
steps.reason: Created synthetic invitation tokens and redacted them in evidence.

steps.name: consent
steps.reason: Mobile browser observed consent information, participant rights, and withdrawal language.

steps.name: round_1
steps.reason: Mobile browser submitted Round 1 through the participant invitation flow.

steps.name: support
steps.reason: Mobile browser submitted the participant support issue path.

steps.name: no_active_task
steps.reason: Mobile browser observed the waiting/no-active-task state between rounds.

steps.name: later_round
steps.reason: Mobile browser submitted a later-round structured judgment task.

steps.name: closeout_completed
steps.reason: Mobile browser observed released participant closeout/final-results state.

steps.name: withdrawal
steps.reason: Mobile browser executed the participant withdrawal path with a synthetic invitation.

steps.name: privacy_redaction_boundary
steps.reason: Artifacts retain only redacted token and participant references; browser observations omit raw URLs.
